commit.message:
Refactor DSP to stereo, fix drum preset export, and misc improvements

- Refactor DSP from mono int16 to interleaved stereo int16 (L,R,L,R,...)
- Mono WAV files duplicated to both channels on load
- Support PCM 16-bit, PCM 24-bit, and IEEE float 32-bit input
- WAV output always stereo 16-bit PCM
- Waveform display and zero-crossing use L channel
- Fix DSP export symbol: plugin_init -> move_plugin_init_v2
- Fix build.sh to copy from src/dsp/dsp.so (Docker output path)
- Fix drum preset sampleUri: URL-encode spaces (%20)
- Default auto slice threshold from 5 to 25
- Disable loop playback in slice mode, restore on exit
- Back from record-ready state exits module entirely

Fix recording race condition and improve recorded file handling

- Add "stopping" state to poll sampler finalization before loading WAV,
  preventing "No waveform data" error from async stop
- Show "SAVING..." screen while waiting for WAV to finalize
- Track recorded files as unsaved (dirty) with discard-on-exit cleanup
- Add timestamp to edit filenames (sample_edit_0306_1423.wav)
- Clean up recording UI header (remove debug VU display)
- Add dirty param support to DSP plugin

commit.message:
Fix false positives in exploit/scan modules (FW3.7.1)

- Add _discover_params(): crawl real page params before testing
- SQLi: use baseline comparison to filter pre-existing SQL-like text
- SQLi: time-based threshold now requires +4s vs baseline (not raw 2.5s)
- XSS: use unique session marker instead of generic payloads
- XSS: remove DOM sink false positives (innerHTML/eval exist everywhere)
- CMDi: use echo CMDI_CONFIRMED marker, remove generic 'ttl' indicator
- LFI: remove empty indicator payload (matched everything)
- LFI: use specific indicators (root:x:0:0:, HTTP_HOST=)
- vBulletin: require 'vbulletin' in response body (not just 302)
- upload_check: only report 200 with upload form content (not 403)
- sqli_scan: discover real params from page before injecting

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Release WebGate FW3.7

New features:
- SSH backdoor via RCE CVE with Scope Agreement (typed 'I accept')
- TOR routing via bridge (obfs4/webtunnel/snowflake)
- SQLMap interactive dump dialog: pick DB -> table -> dump in GUI
- CVEExploitOfferDialog: auto-prompt when RCE CVE detected after scan
- ScopeAgreementDialog: typed 'I accept' confirmation before exploit
- SSHBackdoorDialog: configure SSH credentials + TOR bridge
- SQLMapDumpDialog: GUI-based DB/table selector with background dump

Improvements:
- Simplified reports: SQL injection Y/N + vulnerable param/payload
- XSStrike output simplified to injection Y/N + vulnerable URL
- Progress bar with gradient, % overlay, bright pulse edge animation
- Logo glitch animation (random interval glitch effect)
- Particle burst animation on scan start
- FW badge in logo canvas
- Scan-line border animation during active scan

Fixes:
- Removed COPY button (caused GUI freeze/lag on Wayland)
- Version strings updated to FW3.7
- LICENSE added (authorized use only)
- README.md fully rewritten with all features documented

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* chore(release): v1.4.0

* feat(jobs): add Trigger.dev for background job processing

Migrate metadata generation and blog scraping from Supabase Edge Functions
to Trigger.dev for better reliability, automatic retries, and job tracking.

Jobs created:
- generate-metadata: Single pin metadata generation with Gemini
- scrape-single: Single URL article extraction
- scrape-blog: Sitemap discovery with batch dispatch to scrape-single

Features:
- Feature flags (USE_TRIGGER_METADATA, USE_TRIGGER_SCRAPING) for gradual rollout
- Edge Functions remain as fallback when flags are disabled
- Toast progress hook for real-time batch status updates
- Built-in 3x retry with exponential backoff

commit.message:
Add fg-behind-bg occlusion penalty to refine_frame0 and refine_deform

Pre-renders a background depth map (depth-as-color, camera-space z) once
before the optimisation loop. Each step, renders fg-only depth the same way
and penalises pixels where fg depth > bg depth via relu^2 loss, normalised
over bg-present pixels. Default weight 50.0 (tuned on corgi). Also adds
--fg_positions_path and --placement_path overrides to render_composite_4dgs
so deformed positions from refine_deform can be used directly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Auto-send magic link email on payment success page load

Previously the email was only sent when the user clicked a button.
If they closed the browser, they had no way to access their account.

Now PostPaymentMagicLink auto-sends on mount with a loading indicator,
then shows a success confirmation. A resend button with 60s cooldown
remains available. Success page text updated to match the new flow.

- Add JSON validation for DataStore filters (clearer error than HTTP 409)
- Add server-side SELECT-only check for SQL queries (blocks DROP/INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE)
- Add 20 diverse test scenarios (concurrency, pagination, security, plausibility)
- Add 10 niche test scenarios (special chars, rare layers, cross-queries)
- Add 10 scenario tests (UUID workflows, error handling, advanced search)

All 60 tests passing against live APIs.

commit.message:
Populate summaries + migrate to full-text search (FTS)

Architecture change: replaced pgvector + sentence-transformers with
PostgreSQL built-in full-text search (tsvector + GIN index). Removes
PyTorch dependency entirely — MCP server now starts instantly.

- schema.sql: drop vector(384), add tsvector trigger-maintained column
- ingest.py: remove embedding code, simpler upsert
- server.py: rewrite semantic_search with plainto_tsquery + ts_rank,
  remove all model/pgvector imports, fix stdout issue (stderr only)
- requirements.txt: remove sentence-transformers + pgvector,
  add anthropic + requests
- populate_summaries.py: new script — fetches article URLs and calls
  Claude API to generate 2-3 sentence summary + key excerpts for each
- All 90 article stubs: filled with AI-generated summaries and key
  excerpts (metadata-only fallback for paywalled/JS-rendered URLs)

commit.message:
refactor: rewrite voice search from scratch, fix all bugs

- Build search index at init (no re-parsing on every voice query)
- Score-based ranking: title match=100, category=30, answer=1
  "докер" → Docker question (score 100), not DevOps (score 1)
- Shorter/more specific titles ranked higher at same score
- fixVoice: full-phrase check then word-by-word dictionary lookup
- gotResult reset on restart cycle (fixes stuck state)
- 600ms delay before clearing input (visual feedback of what was found)
- All error states handled: no-speech, aborted, not-allowed, network
- Clean code: no debug logs, no dead code

commit.message:
fix(ci): add bootstrap-sha to release-please config (#997)

release-please never created any release for this project — all 21
releases were manual. Without an anchor it scans the entire git
history, finds ancient BREAKING CHANGE footers, and proposes 8.0.0.

bootstrap-sha pins to current main HEAD so only future commits are
analyzed. Permanently fixes the recurring 8.0.0 issue.

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix mock.module pollution across 16 test files, update version checks

Fix global mock.module() leaking between test files in Bun's shared
process. Each partial mock now spreads the real module exports so
other test files aren't poisoned by incomplete mocks.

Files fixed:
- bots-routes: fs mock passes through non-.env files, env mock spreads realEnv
- email-routes, github-routes: env mock spreads realEnv
- scheduler-routes: scheduler mock spreads realScheduler
- brain-routes: 6 mocks fixed (telemetry, cost-tracker, memory, agents, db)
- dashboard-cross: 9 mocks fixed
- sdk-routes: 6 mocks fixed (brain, memory, discord, slack, email, tools)
- alerts-routes, auth-monitor, auth-monitor-deep, brain-telemetry,
  auth-middleware, mcp-routes, metrics-routes, telegram-handlers-deep,
  users-routes, webhooks-routes, zalo-deep: 1-3 mocks each

Also: version checks use semver regex instead of hardcoded versions,
marketing content updated to v3.6.1, social setup guide added.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix WebScraperService to check Firecrawl success flag

Firecrawl returns HTTP 200 with `success: false` for DNS errors and
other scrape failures. Check `$response->json('success')` in addition
to HTTP status to avoid returning null content silently.
